---
title: "Missouri Works"
author: "Nicholas Ilvento"
date: "2025-11-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
package_updater=function(){
  #CRAN mirror (no prompts)
  options(repos=c(CRAN="https://cloud.r-project.org"))
  #Target library (first lib path)
  lib=.libPaths()[1]
  dir.create(lib,recursive=TRUE,showWarnings=FALSE)
  #Safe installer (binary-first, quiet, stable)
  safe_install=function(pkg,lib){
    tryCatch({
      message("Installing ",pkg," (binary)")
      install.packages(pkg,lib=lib,repos=getOption("repos"),dependencies=TRUE,type="binary",quiet=TRUE)
    },error=function(e){
      stop("Failed to install package: ",pkg,"\n",conditionMessage(e))
    })
  }
  #Required packages
  required_packages=c("readxl","dplyr","tidyr","stringr","stringi","janitor","tibble","lubridate","openxlsx",
                      "writexl","purrr","scales","tools","stringdist","pdftools","base64enc","glue","httr","magrittr",
                      "reticulate","fs","qpdf","emayili","blastula","rvest","jsonlite","xml2","curl","shiny",
                      "htmltools","zip","later","shinyjs","maps","readr")
  #Install missing packages
  installed=installed.packages(lib.loc=lib)[,"Package"]
  missing=setdiff(required_packages,installed)
  if(length(missing)){
    for(pkg in missing){
      safe_install(pkg,lib)
    }
  }
  #Critical package validation
  critical=c("stringi","pdftools","qpdf","shiny")
  for(pkg in critical){
    if(!requireNamespace(pkg,quietly=TRUE)){
      stop("Critical package failed to install: ",pkg)
    }
  }
  #Load packages quietly
  for(pkg in required_packages){
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg,character.only=TRUE,quietly=TRUE))
  }
  #Diagnostics: package versions
  package_versions=sapply(required_packages,function(pkg) as.character(packageVersion(pkg)))
  cat("\nLoaded package versions:\n")
  print(package_versions)
  #RDCOMClient (OmegaHat source)
  if(!requireNamespace("RDCOMClient",quietly=TRUE)){
    message("Installing RDCOMClient from OmegaHat...")
    install.packages("RDCOMClient",repos="http://www.omegahat.net/R",type="source")
  } else{
    message("RDCOMClient is already installed.")
  }
  library(RDCOMClient)
  invisible(TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
package_updater()
directory="K:/Atlas Automation"
#Define preferred path
preferred_path=paste0(directory,"/Programs/Site Selection/Kinetic 4-22-2026")
#Define fallback (Downloads in USERPROFILE)
fallback_path=file.path(Sys.getenv("USERPROFILE"),"Downloads")
#Choose path based on existence
folder_path=if(dir.exists(preferred_path)) preferred_path else fallback_path
#Read data
original_file_path=paste0(folder_path,"/Job Data 10 States 4-22-2026.xlsx")
process_job_data=function(file_path){
  file_ext=tools::file_ext(file_path)
  #Default sheet logic
  sheet=ifelse(file_ext=="xlsx",4,1)
  #XLSX Path
  if(file_ext=="xlsx"){
    df=read_excel(file_path,sheet=sheet,col_names=FALSE)
    df_t=as.data.frame(t(df),stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
    new_names=as.character(df_t[1,])
    new_names[is.na(new_names)|new_names==""]=paste0("V",which(is.na(new_names)|new_names==""))
    colnames(df_t)=new_names
    df_t=df_t[-1,]
    colnames(df_t)=make.unique(colnames(df_t))
    df_t=rownames_to_column(df_t,var="Original_Column")
    rownames(df_t)=NULL
    df_t=df_t[,-1]
    colnames(df_t)[1]="State"
    colnames(df_t)=gsub("\\."," ",colnames(df_t))
    is_empty_col=function(col){
      all(is.na(col)|col==""|col=="NA")
    }
    cols=colnames(df_t)
    i=1
    current_prefix=""
    started=FALSE
    prefix_list=c()
    while(i<=length(cols)){
      if(!started){
        if(cols[i]=="Occupation Metrics" && is_empty_col(df_t[[i]])){
          started=TRUE
        }
        i=i+1
        next
      }
      if(is_empty_col(df_t[[i]])){
        new_prefix=cols[i]
        if(!is.na(new_prefix) && new_prefix!="" && new_prefix!="NA"){
          current_prefix=new_prefix
          if(!(current_prefix %in% prefix_list)){
            prefix_list=c(prefix_list,current_prefix)
          }
        }
        i=i+1
        next
      }
      if(current_prefix!="" && cols[i]!=current_prefix){
        cols[i]=trimws(paste(current_prefix,cols[i]))
      }
      i=i+1
    }
    colnames(df_t)=cols
    colnames(df_t)=gsub("\\s+\\d{1,2}$","",colnames(df_t))
    colnames(df_t)=trimws(gsub("\\s+"," ",colnames(df_t)))
    return(list(data=df_t,prefixes=prefix_list,sheet_used=sheet))
  }
  #CSV Path
  if(file_ext=="csv"){
    df_t=read.csv(file_path,stringsAsFactors=FALSE,check.names=FALSE)
    colnames(df_t)=gsub("\\."," ",colnames(df_t))
    colnames(df_t)=trimws(colnames(df_t))
    prefix_list=NULL
    #Build prefixes + adjust Metric labels
    if(all(c("Category","Sub-Category","Metric") %in% names(df_t))){
      prefix_list=df_t%>%filter(Category=="Occupation Metrics")%>%pull(`Sub-Category`)%>%unique()%>%as.character()
      df_t=df_t%>%mutate(Metric=dplyr::if_else(Category=="Occupation Metrics" & !is.na(`Sub-Category`) & !is.na(Metric),
        paste(`Sub-Category`,Metric),Metric))
    }
    #Convert to wide format: County × Metrics
    if(all(c("County","Metric") %in% names(df_t))){
      #Detect value column (adjust if you know exact name)
      value_col=setdiff(names(df_t),c("County","Metric","Category","Sub-Category"))[1]
      df_t=df_t%>%mutate(Metric=trimws(Metric))%>%pivot_wider(names_from=Metric,values_from=all_of(value_col))
    }
    #Move County into proper row identifier column
    if("County" %in% names(df_t)){
      df_t=df_t%>%rename(State=County)
    }
    #Transpose to match Excel structure (if needed for downstream logic)
    df_t=as.data.frame(t(df_t),stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
    new_names=as.character(df_t[1,])
    new_names[is.na(new_names)|new_names==""]=paste0("V",which(is.na(new_names)|new_names==""))
    colnames(df_t)=new_names
    df_t=df_t[-1,]
    #Take second row as new column names
    new_names=as.character(df_t[2,])
    #Clean names
    new_names[is.na(new_names)|new_names==""]=paste0("V",which(is.na(new_names)|new_names==""))
    #Assign as column names
    colnames(df_t)=new_names
    #Remove first two rows (since row 2 became headers)
    df_t=df_t[-c(1,2),]
    colnames(df_t)=make.unique(as.character(colnames(df_t)))
    #Move rownames into a "County" column
    df_t=tibble::rownames_to_column(df_t,var="County")
    #Make County the first column explicitly (safe)
    df_t=df_t%>%relocate(County,.before=1)
    rownames(df_t)=NULL
    #Return
    return(list(data=df_t,prefixes=prefix_list,sheet_used=sheet))
  }
  stop("Unsupported file type: ",file_ext)
}
#Get all csv and xlsx files in folder
files=list.files(path=folder_path,pattern="\\.(xlsx|csv)$",full.names=TRUE)
#Build a data frame
file_list_df=data.frame(file_name=basename(files),file_path=files,stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
state_names=tolower(state.name)
date_pattern="\\b\\d{1,2}-\\d{1,2}-\\d{2,4}\\b"
for(i in seq_len(nrow(file_list_df))){
  file_name_lower=tolower(file_list_df$file_name[i])
  file_path=file_list_df$file_path[i]
  #Case 1: "Data" + date → generic output
  if(grepl("data",file_name_lower) && grepl(date_pattern,file_name_lower)){
    result=process_job_data(file_path)
    df_t=result$data
    prefix_list=result$prefixes
    cat("Loaded generic data file:",file_list_df$file_name[i],"\n")
    next
  }
  #Case 2: State-specific files
  matched_state=state_names[sapply(state_names,function(s) grepl(s,file_name_lower))]
  if(length(matched_state)==0) next
  state=matched_state[1]
  state_clean=gsub(" ","_",state)
  result=process_job_data(file_path)
  assign(paste0(state_clean,"_df_t"),result$data,envir=.GlobalEnv)
  assign(paste0(state_clean,"_prefix_list"),result$prefixes,envir=.GlobalEnv)
  cat("Loaded state file:",state,"\n")
}
us_map=map_data("state")
county_map=map_data("county")
#US MAP (df_t + prefix_list)
df_main=df_t%>%mutate(State=tolower(State))
for(prefix in unique(prefix_list)){
  year=format(Sys.Date(),"%Y")
  prev_year=as.character(as.numeric(year)-1)
  col_candidates=c(paste(prefix,year,"Employment Concentration"),paste(prefix,prev_year,"Employment Concentration"),
                    paste(prefix,"Employment Concentration"))
  col_name=col_candidates[col_candidates %in% names(df_main)][1]
  if(is.na(col_name)) next
  plot_df=df_main%>%select(State,value=all_of(col_name))%>%mutate(value=as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9\\.\\-]","",value)))%>%
    group_by(State)%>%summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=TRUE),.groups="drop")
  map_plot=us_map%>%left_join(plot_df,by=c("region"="State"))
  p=ggplot(map_plot,aes(long,lat,group=group,fill=value))+geom_polygon(color="white")+coord_fixed(1.3)+
    labs(title=paste(prefix,"- US Employment Concentration"),fill="Concentration")+theme_void()+
    scale_fill_gradient(low="#c6dbef",high="#08306b",na.value="lightgray")
  ggsave(filename=file.path(folder_path,paste0("US_",gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]","_",prefix),".png")),plot=p,width=8,height=5)
}
#State Maps (Only State + Counties)
df_names=ls(pattern="_df_t$")
for(df_name in df_names){
  if(df_name=="df_t") next
  state_name=gsub("_df_t$","",df_name)
  prefix_name=paste0(state_name,"_prefix_list")
  if(!exists(prefix_name)) next
  df_state=get(df_name)
  prefix_list_state=get(prefix_name)
  state_lower=gsub("_"," ",tolower(state_name))
  #Clean county names
  df_state=df_state%>%mutate(County=tolower(County),County=gsub(",.*$","",County),County=gsub(" county$","",County),
    County=trimws(County))
  #Only County Map For This State
  state_county_map=county_map%>%filter(region==state_lower)
  for(prefix in unique(prefix_list_state)){
    year=format(Sys.Date(),"%Y")
    prev_year=as.character(as.numeric(year)-1)
    col_candidates=c(paste(prefix,year,"Employment Concentration"),paste(prefix,prev_year,"Employment Concentration"),
      paste(prefix,"Employment Concentration"))
    col_name=col_candidates[col_candidates %in% names(df_state)][1]
    if(is.na(col_name)) next
    safe_prefix=gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]","_",prefix)
    #State-Only County Map (No US Map)
    plot_df_county=df_state%>%select(County,value=all_of(col_name))%>%mutate(value=parse_number(value))%>%
      group_by(County)%>%summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=TRUE),.groups="drop")
    map_plot_county=state_county_map%>%left_join(plot_df_county,by=c("subregion"="County"))
    p_county=ggplot(map_plot_county,aes(long,lat,group=group,fill=value))+geom_polygon(color="white",linewidth=0.3)+
      coord_fixed(1.2)+labs(title=paste(str_to_title(state_name),"- County -",prefix),fill="Concentration")+
      theme_void()+scale_fill_gradient(low="#c6dbef",high="#08306b",na.value="lightgray")
    ggsave(filename=file.path(folder_path,paste0(state_name,"_county_",safe_prefix,".png")),plot=p_county,width=8,height=6)
  }
}
```
```{r}
```
